error_signature: only accessing latest iteration of loop
title: Accessing all items after exiting an If node
symptom: After exiting a loop with an If node, only the latest iteration is accessible, not all items that passed through the loop.
applies_when: Using an If node to exit a loop
Wanting to access all items from the loop
not_this_if: Only need the latest iteration or true branch result
root_cause: When an If node is used to break a loop, n8n typically only passes the items that meet the true condition. Items that fall into the false branch are not automatically retained unless explicitly wired back into the loop.
fix_steps: Wire the false branch of the If node back to the Loop node
Use the Loop node's done output to access all items
Filter the items as needed based on your requirements
agent_instruction: Wire the false branch of the If node back to the Loop node to access all items.
